name.en: One Way To Solve A Problem

itemName.en: AR-10 7.62x51 Magpul PMAG 20 SR-LR GEN M3 20-round magazine

itemName.zh: 沙漠科技 MDR 7.62x51 突击步枪

description.zh:
你好，今天确实是个好日子。
你带回来的卡片和钥匙确实帮了大忙，解开了谜团。我的人分别在两个办公室中找到了他们要找的全部证据。
看来……这一切的幕后主使，正是 Sanitar 和他那帮人。
这个疯医生，果然哪儿有他哪儿就有麻烦。

现在我能看出一条清晰的线索了——只要这人出现，事情必然复杂化。
我会找个能解决他的人。如果你有兴趣接手这件事，欢迎告诉我；如果没兴趣，也别介意，收下你的酬劳，我会另找他人。
description.en:
Well good day, it is actually a good day now.
The card and key you brought me actually helped solving the mystery. Well, my men found exactly what they were looking for inside both offices.
We found all the evidence, by the looks of it Sanitar's gang was behind it.
Of course... this crazy scientist.

I see a pattern now, everywhere where this man is involved, there's trouble.
I'm sure I will find someone that is able to take care of the problem, if you are interested in helping, let me know, if not I suggest you enjoy your payment. I'll find someone else for this task.
